Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Have we received a new mission?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I dunno, but the alarm's not ringin'...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Are your wounds healed up!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Huh? Where'd you get this collar...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}That collar is designed to help control his Persona. Basically, it's an Evoker for dogs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Wait... Does that mean Koromaru is going to fight with us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I honestly wasn't expecting this either. But the test results show it's quite possible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}In fact, it was actually a request from the chairman. We'll be looking after him here in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Koro-chan, is this what you want?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}He says, "I'm returning the favor."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Hey, sounds good to me. I, for one, welcome him with open arms.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}The more the merrier, right? Who cares if you're a dog?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Alright, I'll take him for a walk. And it's the perfect time, 'cause it's summer break![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}You're free to enjoy your vacation, but don't forget about your schoolwork.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Summer classes start next week, so don't lose focus just because we have a lot of time off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Summer classes. Did you not hear about them?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}We're going to be taking supplemental courses. I've already applied for all of us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I know how difficult it's been to balance both school and our late-night excursions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}I'm sure you haven't had much time to study, so I apologize for that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}The chairman agreed it was a good idea as well... I could've sworn I told Takeba and Yamagishi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Are you serious!? First I've heard of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Oh, um, sorry... I completely forgot to mention it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Hey, you're the one with the worst grades here. Why are you so surprised?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}W-Well, it's only for a few weeks, so let's do our best...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...At any rate, we've gained a new ally.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru... He is a loyal companion[n]who will fight valiantly for his master.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}As the team leader, I must[n]properly support him.[n]{f 1 1}
